name: ASSIGNEES_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Assignees by targetpair. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name: $tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Who filed patents related to B7H3/ROR1?
Who filed patents related to CD40/IL15?
Who filed patents related to CD3/HLA-A?
